opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I was just sitting at the table, my heart suddenly fluttered violently, and I woke up on the floor completely disoriented.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden fainting episode while seated at rest, preceded by a brief violent heart flutter, with rapid recovery, now very frightened because of the family history.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden, while sitting at the table at rest, with no exertion or emotional trigger
symptom_narrative.duration: very brief - blacked out and woke on the floor, recovered quickly without prolonged confusion
symptom_narrative.character: a very brief, intense heart flutter immediately before blacking out, then waking on the floor disoriented
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: terrifying - a complete blackout with no warning
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: collapsed to the floor; the flutter felt like it was in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: happened at rest with no warning; I have had frequent unprovoked flutters or awareness of a fast heartbeat over the last six months that I brushed off
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: recovered on its own within a short time
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing I noticed - it came out of nowhere while I was just sitting
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: brief violent palpitation just before; no chest pain; no tongue-biting, no wetting myself, and I wasn't confused for long afterwards
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no previous full faints, but frequent unprovoked palpitations/awareness of a rapid heartbeat over the past six months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: fully recovered and independent now, but extremely anxious

family_history_as_reported.narrative: a brother had a sudden cardiac arrest at age 28
mother was diagnosed with atrial fibrillation in her 30s

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: no illicit drug use; sibling is present at home and monitoring closely

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: terrified by the family history of young sudden death and worried the faint will happen again

communication_style.typical_message_style: clear account with the sibling present and able to corroborate the collapse
